summary: The user is seeking advice on model building techniques, particularly focusing on weathering effects for their models. They have recently resumed building model cars, specifically a 1/25 scale Ford Mustang Shelby GT350R, and are exploring the use of Vallejo paints. The conversation also covers creating realistic details like seatbelts and dashboards, as well as preparing for an upcoming local model building competition.
facts: The user started building model cars again about three months ago. The user is currently working on a 1/25 scale Ford Mustang Shelby GT350R. The user has been using Tamiya acrylics for their first few projects. The user has recently started trying out Vallejo paints for their model. The user is considering adding realistic seatbelts and a dashboard to their model. The user is thinking about entering a local model building competition next month. The user is looking for advice on model building techniques, specifically weathering effects. The user has been watching YouTube tutorials to improve their model building skills. The user is interested in using photo-etched metal for creating dashboard components. The user is exploring the use of thread or yarn for making seatbelt straps. The user is gathering reference images to help with the dashboard design.
